mapper.sql: id, email, password_hash, nickname, role, local_city, education_text, expected_position, expected_salary_min, expected_salary_max, skill_input_text, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: select from sys_user where email = #{email} limit 1
select from sys_user where id = #{id} limit 1

where.if: and ( email like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or nickname like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or local_city like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select:
select from sys_user
order by id desc limit #{pageSize} offset #{offset}
